title: Danaher Corporation (DHR)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Danaher Corporation. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what DHR is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Derived mathematically from historical free cash flow performance, bounded to conservative, realistic limits.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
">
10Y Treasury: 4.18%. Adding a 5.0% standard equity risk premium results in a mathematically derived 9.18% discount rate.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
">
A sustainable long-term terminal growth rate slightly below long-term GDP growth.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
